'''Ish'tay''' was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] ecologist and [[Force Adept]] with ocher-colored skin. He was deeply spiritual, though not orthodox by Ithorian standards. He worshiped an aspect of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], had several metal rings on his pierced neck, dressed only in a simple cloak, and carried a gnarled staff. He traveled to the devastated world of [[Caamas/Legends|Caamas]], hoping to inspect the alien jungle growing in the southern hemisphere, but soon sensed a disturbing spiritual presence on the planet. With the help of local adventurers, Ish'tay discovered a massive [[Ithorian Herdship]] buried beneath the forest.

Ish'tay's unconventional understanding of the Force nevertheless allowed him to sense others' emotional states and heal the wounds of others.
